This is not perfect but it's my understanding of the bio .

"Why someone reject peace , when they know it's answer? " It's the most common human nature . Sometimes we know that's the right path i should choose it , But we don't . Reason for not choosing the right path (where we get peace ) 1. Unfamiliarity - fear of the unknown. 2. Unresolved hurt - we keep remembering what hurt us . thus keep hurting. 3. Emotional attachment to someone who we know is not right for us . But we still choose to say . At last - peace is simple but not easy .

Happy Birthday🎂 Kawal Sir🎉
Your kindness, patience and way of teaching have truly changed the way I look at history. I used to run away from the subject, but from the very first class, you made it come alive for me. The clarity, examples and the calm way you explain everything have made modern history not just understandable, but enjoyable.Thank you for being such an inspiring teacher and a wonderful person. Wishing you good health, happiness, and endless success ahead.

First time ek sath sab fight kr rahe the , chahe apne apne interest ke liye ho. Isse phele sab regional revolt kr rahe the - very small scale .

Aap ek flow me batao nah ki start kaise hua as a sepoy mutiny vo apne interest ke liye fight kr rahe the . isse phele bhi bahut region revolt ho rahe the . But isme inhone ek leader chose kiya ( bhadur shah ) aur ye mass movement banaga . Toh sidha batao ki start hua tha as sepoy mutiny but baadme log judte rahe aur bada revolt ban gaya . Iska objective bas pig or beef fat se hatkr British ko nikalne pe chala gaya .
Conclude it was both but not Fully national in scale

You can say it started from the trigger - enfield rifle as sepoy mutiny but later on peasants , rulers , intellectuals joined .  Initially military nature tha revolt ka but baadme ek broad uprising against British bana .
